calendar.matters:
Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Haithan Ballout appearing for the Quraish family. He was informed by Mr. Pointer that he will be late. He is objecting to Mr. Pointer's tardiness everytime. He has forwarded the original signed settlement agreement to Mr. Pointer. Court is willing to continue this matter for one week. Mr. Ballout asked the Court to pass the matter.
At 10:06am, Adante Pointer appearing as administrator. Mr. Roberts is not available today. Haithan Ballout appearing for the Quraish family. Mr. Pointer has the executed settlement agreement and Mr. Ballout is satisfied. Court will approve the settlement agreement. Court will need an order. Court instructed Mr. Pointer to file the settlement agreement and submit an order to Mr. Ballout for approval as to form and then file a petition for final distribution.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Anderson.

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Continued To Jun-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Courtney Kujawski appearing for respondents. Adante Pointer appearing for petitioner. Mr. Roberts is not available this morning. They are still waiting for the wife's signature on the settlement agreement. She is in Yemen. The document was sent to her ten days ago. One of the brother is also in Yemen. They will need to get the signature from the wife and send it back to Yemen for the brother's signature. Court will allow the other brother to sign for him if he has a written authorization from his brother. Matter is continued to 6/20. Court wants Mr. Pointer to file a petition to close the estate.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Continued To May-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Haithan Ballout appearing for and with Mohamed Quraish. Hiawatha Roberts appearing for surviving spouse. Adante Pointer, administrator is in court. Court finds it is community property. Court does not see a formal settlement agreement. Mr. Roberts has a declaration from the wife that he wants the Court to review. She is in Yemen. He is requesting for authority to allow the administrator to sign for the wife. Mr. Ballout objected. He is going to prepare the formal settlement agreement and send it to Yemen for her to sign. Court wants the wife to sign the settlement agreement. Matter is continued to 5/9.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Off Calendar

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Continued To Feb-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Hiwatha Roberts appearing for and with administrator Adante Pointer. Courtney Kujawski appearing for and with Mohamed and Nageeb Quraish. Mr. Roberts has filed some documents this morning. He wants the Court to review them. Court is passing this case for the staff attorney to review the documents.
All parties returned to court with an agreemnt to have a hearing to approve the settlement on 2/28. All matters are continued to 2/28. Mr. Ballout's office will prepare the settlement agreement.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Continued To Feb-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Continued To Jan-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hiawatha Roberts (counsel for Najwa Alhaj); Haith Ballout (Counsel for Mohamed Quraish).

After extensive oratory by Mr. Roberts concerning whether the subject property was held as community property or separate property by the decedent and as to whether a conflict of interest might result if he were to file the petition(s) for appointment of guardian ad litem, it was resolved that Mr. Robets could file the requested petition(s) without conflict. As such, the Court continued the matter to January 24, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Roberts sufficient time to complete the guardian ad litem process.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Continued To Jan-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Haitham Ballout appearing for Mr. Quraish, the father. Other counsel is not in court. He has failed to file a petition for appointment of guardian ad litem for the minor. OSC will be issued to the administrator and his attorney. Return date is 1/10/07. All matters are continued to 1/10/07. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
The Administrator appeared in court after the calendar is concluded. He said his attorney Mr. Robert did not file the petition because of conflict of interest. Proceeding not reported.

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Continued To Dec-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Haitham Ballout appearing for and with Mohamed Quraish. Also appearing Calig Ahash.
The matter is continued to October 24, 2006.
The matter is recalled at 10:03. Now appearing is Hiawatha Roberts for Adante Porter.
The court is requesting the following:1)Declaration stating that the property is community property. 2)Petition for approval of settlement is to be filed. 3)Petition for guardian ad litem is to be filed. The matter is now continued to December 05, 2005 for status.
Judge: John Dearman Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Continued To Oct-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Haithan Ballout appearing for the family. Adante Pointer appearing as administrator. Parties have reached settlement of the claim. The administrator will file a petition for approval of the settlement. The administrator informs the Court that Mr. Robert does not think the minors will need a Guardian Ad Litem because the assets are community property. Court does not see it that way. The administrator wants to brief that issue. A brother/cousin of the decedent is in court. He will serve as the Guradian Ad Litem. Settlement agreement placed on the record by Mr. Ballout. The administrator wants to place a lien on the business until the funds are paid. Mr. Ballout does not have authority from the clients to agree to it. Matter is continued to 10/17. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Partition Of Partnership; For Return Of Property To Estate; For Accounting; And For Temporary And Permanent Injunction

MINI MINUTES: Haithan Ballout appearing for Mohamed Quraish. Adante Pointer appearing as the personal representative. The parties are working on a settlement. They have reached a number that one side has agree. Mr. Ballout has not been able to reach his client to confirm the agreement. He is requesting a continuance for one week. Court questions the Letters is not issued. Mr. Pointer said the Letters was issued yesterday. Court wants a guardian ad litem to be appointed for the minor. Mr. Pointer will address that issue in the next hearing. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
